assets.notes: Beauty-focused, social-first UGC aesthetic with natural skin texture.

cta.text: BUY ONE, GET ONE FREE TODAY!

promptVars.product: a supplement bottle with a bright pink label that reads HAIR, SKIN AND NAILS GUMMY, white cap, brand name covered by a black rectangle, visible on the desk near the lower-right side of frame
promptVars.subject: woman early to mid 20s with a sharp jawline, hollow cheeks, natural glam makeup with visible skin texture, hair loosely tied back, medium hoop earrings, simple tank top, and a casually confident look
promptVars.scene: small messy dorm bedroom at night with warm lamp light, dim overhead light, a slight red-orange cast on the wall, cluttered furniture, casual wall decor, and a messy bed in the background
promptVars.extra: Photorealistic 4:5 iPhone front-camera still with accidental short-form UGC vibe, not influencer. The phone is resting on a desk or laptop with a slight upward angle, off-center framing, shoulder partially cropped, and tiny natural motion blur. She is holding a small stainless-steel mini microphone near her mouth with a black cord visible toward the camera. Expression is mid-sentence, calm, slightly amused, and looking more at the screen than directly into the lens. Reserve clean empty background space in the lower-left.

comment.text: Recorded this quick in my dorm and i swear this is the glow-up combo that actually worked for me.
